name: Mailchimp
description: Mailchimp is an email marketing and automation platform. Manage audiences/lists, subscribers, campaigns, templates, automations, segments, tags, and access detailed analytics and reports.

capabilities.name: lists_list
capabilities.description: List all audiences (lists) in your Mailchimp account.

capabilities.name: lists_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific audience by its ID.

capabilities.name: lists_create
capabilities.description: Create a new audience/list.

capabilities.name: lists_update
capabilities.description: Update an audience's settings.

capabilities.name: lists_delete
capabilities.description: Delete an audience/list.

capabilities.name: members_list
capabilities.description: List subscribers in an audience with filtering options.

capabilities.name: members_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific subscriber by their email hash.

capabilities.name: members_add
capabilities.description: Add a new subscriber to an audience.

capabilities.name: members_update
capabilities.description: Update an existing subscriber's information.

capabilities.name: members_archive
capabilities.description: Archive (soft delete) a subscriber from an audience.

capabilities.name: members_add_or_update
capabilities.description: Add or update a subscriber using PUT (upsert by email).

capabilities.name: members_search
capabilities.description: Search for members across all audiences by email or other criteria.

capabilities.name: members_tags_update
capabilities.description: Add or remove tags from a subscriber.

capabilities.name: campaigns_list
capabilities.description: List all campaigns in your account.

capabilities.name: campaigns_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_update
capabilities.description: Update a campaign's settings before sending.

capabilities.name: campaigns_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_send
capabilities.description: Send a campaign immediately.

capabilities.name: campaigns_schedule
capabilities.description: Schedule a campaign to send at a future date/time.

capabilities.name: campaigns_content_set
capabilities.description: Set the HTML content for a campaign.

capabilities.name: campaigns_content_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve the content of a campaign.

capabilities.name: reports_get
capabilities.description: Get performance report for a sent campaign (opens, clicks, bounces).

capabilities.name: reports_list
capabilities.description: List reports for all sent campaigns.

capabilities.name: templates_list
capabilities.description: List all email templates.

capabilities.name: templates_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve a specific template.

capabilities.name: templates_create
capabilities.description: Create a new email template.

capabilities.name: templates_update
capabilities.description: Update a template's name or HTML.

capabilities.name: templates_delete
capabilities.description: Delete a template.

capabilities.name: segments_list
capabilities.description: List all segments for an audience.

capabilities.name: segments_create
capabilities.description: Create a new segment for an audience.

capabilities.name: automations_list
capabilities.description: List all automations (automated email series).

capabilities.name: automations_get
capabilities.description: Retrieve details of a specific automation.

capabilities.name: automations_pause
capabilities.description: Pause all emails in an automation.

capabilities.name: automations_start
capabilities.description: Start all emails in an automation.
